name: A W Shire Student TRNSPRTN
recent_news: No public news, website, FMCSA SAFER record, or directory listing surfaced for an 'A W Shire Student Transportation' at 6603 Queen Ave S, Richfield MN. Cannot confirm it is an active independent school bus operator vs. a small/defunct doing-business-as. Richfield-area pupil transport is dominated by Richfield Bus Company and First Student.
fit_notes: Too small and too opaque to evaluate. Would require direct outreach/MN SOS lookup to confirm the entity exists as an operating school bus contractor; not a clear Summit tuck-in until existence and fleet are verified.

name: School To Home Drop-Off
recent_news: No website, FMCSA carrier record, news, or business directory hits found tying 'School To Home Drop-Off' (3925 Thoroughbred Trl, Fort Worth) to a school bus contract operator. Profile suggests a residential-address, micro-scale owner-operated kid shuttle/drop-off service (similar to Smiley Transportation or Sulekha-listed shuttles in the DFW market) rather than a contracted yellow-bus operator.
fit_notes: Likely a sub-scale, sole-proprietor sedan/van child-shuttle, not a yellow-bus contractor. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in target.

name: School Bound TRNSPRTN LLC
districts_or_customers: Brick Township area private/parochial and public schools (implied; not publicly confirmed)
recent_news: USDOT 3625417 active, intrastate-only private passenger (business) carrier with 20 power units and 9 drivers per MCS-150 dated 09/17/2022; 1 reported injury crash in the 24 months prior. Received a $2,587 PPP loan in May 2020 (Cross River Bank) listed under school and employee bus transportation, retaining ~6 jobs. No M&A or PE ownership signals.
fit_notes: Genuine small NJ school bus LLC (~20 buses) in a state where Summit/Beacon/STA/SBT all actively roll up. Likely too small to move the needle but plausible tuck-in if owner is retiring; needs principal/owner identification and route/contract diligence.

name: Cal Coast Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: No district contracts identified; markets to corporate, weddings, sports, concerts and ad-hoc school trips
recent_news: USDOT 4061166 (interstate for-hire passenger), 5 power units (1 owned + 4 term-leased motorcoaches), 7 drivers, 110,000 VMT in 2024, MCS-150 updated 06/30/2025. Website (calcoastbus.com) positions as a Southern California charter bus operator, not a contracted home-to-school yellow bus carrier.
fit_notes: Charter/motorcoach operator (with school field-trip work), not a home-to-school routed contractor. Out of Summit's tuck-in lane; pass.

name: H D School Transport LLC
recent_news: No website, FMCSA SAFER snapshot, news, or California pupil-transport vendor listing surfaced for 'H D School Transport LLC' at 9756 11th Ave, Hesperia. Hesperia USD's pupil transport is contracted to First Student (760-244-4022); other High Desert school-bus work is handled by charter/minibus operators like Hesperia Minibus Company.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm it is an operating contracted school bus carrier; address is residential and no DOT/online footprint. Not actionable without direct verification (CA SOS / CHP school bus certification list).
